name: sacred temple
hints: A sacred temple at the top of the staircase. More temple rooms lie to the west.
GO STAIRCASE to return down to the shore. Go WEST to explore deeper into the temple where an altar awaits.
WEST leads to the altar room. The temple complex has hidden chambers with treasures and puzzles.
notes: Entry room of the sacred temple complex. GO STAIRCASE returns to room 20 (the staircase). West leads to the altar room (room 22). Part of the temple island exploration.
